task_completion.description: The background image is open and visible in the image editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A photograph (not a blank canvas) is visible in the main workspace of the image editor (GIMP).

task_completion.description: The Ellipse/Circle selection tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ellipse Select tool icon is highlighted or depressed in the application's toolbox.

task_completion.description: A circular shape or selection is created on the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular dashed line ('marching ants' selection) or a circular outline is visible on the canvas. It should be roughly circular, not a highly elongated oval.

task_completion.description: The circular shape is positioned in the center of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The circle is located in the central region of the canvas, leaving roughly equal margins on the top/bottom and left/right.

task_completion.description: Red color is selected in the color palette.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The foreground color swatch in the toolbox shows a pure red color.

task_completion.description: The circular shape is filled with solid red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interior of the circular shape on the canvas is completely filled with solid red color.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with the GIMP toolbox, canvas, and menus, rather than a terminal window executing an ImageMagick or Python script.

integrity.description: The red circle is drawn directly on the provided background image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The red circle appears overlaid on the photograph, not on a separate blank white canvas or a different file.

integrity.description: The agent performed the steps to draw and fill the circle rather than opening a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate steps (like making a selection before filling it, or selecting the color) are visible across the trajectory of screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The background image is an 800x600 Unsplash JPEG. The target shape is a circle (circularity >= 0.65) with a diameter of 100-500 pixels (occupying 2-30% of the image area). It must be filled with pure red (#FF0000, R>=200, G<=80, B<=80). The circle must be positioned within the central 70% of the image (15%-85% on both axes). The agent passes if it meets at least 3 of these 4 criteria (shape, color, position, size).
